title: OpenAI Family Policy Hub Split
problem: The llm_dart_openai package still centralizes typed option resolution and compatibility bag parsing in one large policy hub, which makes feature-specific OpenAI-family behavior harder to split and audit.

evidence.summary: Generate-text and OpenAI-family typed option compatibility helpers were split into a dedicated part file without changing the public facade or resolver behavior.

Embedding, image, speech, and transcription option compatibility helpers were split into a non-text part file; focused OpenAI tests, package analysis, workspace/root guards, and git diff --check passed.
OpenAI-family resolvers now use a resolver-facing invocation options seam; the compatibility bag bridge stays available to internal package code while typed option classes remain the preferred path.

continue_policy.notes: The OpenAI-family policy hub split is complete. Follow-on: the public barrels no longer re-export the ProviderOptionsBag compatibility bridge, and any further deprecation/removal of the remaining helper functions should be handled in a separate breaking-line lane if needed.
